summary: First testing iteration for Pi and Pixels MVP. All 8 backend pytest cases passed (health, root, valid admission with persistence + email_status='sent', invalid class rejection, invalid payload rejection, all 9 valid class values accepted, honeypot silent drop without persistence, no _id leakage). All 7 frontend Playwright checks passed: hero heading/sub, 4 course cards, WhatsApp wa.me/917449858122, header Apply scrolls to #apply, empty-form inline errors (full-name/phone/school-name/class), full form submit shows admission-success with 'Your response has been recorded', and mobile menu toggle reveals menu. Resend is in test/sandbox mode but emails reported email_status='sent' for the verified admin address.
critical_code_review_comments: logger is initialised AFTER it is referenced in send_admission_email/create_admission. Logging works only because functions are lazily invoked, but the logger is technically a module-level global defined further down — move logging.basicConfig & logger = logging.getLogger above route definitions for clarity and to avoid future NameError refactors.
Honeypot returns success:true with no id; consider returning a synthetic id to avoid bots distinguishing real vs dropped responses (currently id is None so a clever bot can detect honeypot).
DB_NAME='test_database' in backend/.env — fine for now but should be a project-specific name before production.
send_admission_email runs synchronously within the request thread (via asyncio.to_thread). For high traffic this can slow responses; consider FastAPI BackgroundTasks.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth on this MVP
seed_data_creation: Several TEST_-prefixed admissions inserted in the admissions collection during the run (kept for traceability; can be cleaned via Mongo if needed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_admissions.py (pytest). All public endpoints work via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend selectors are stable (data-testid). Note: GET /api/admissions does not require auth — fine for MVP, flag if security needed later.
